name: Salad Greens with Prosciutto and Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the prosciutto and mix with 2 teaspoons of olive oil in an 8 to 10 inch frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. Cook until lightly browned.
3. Pour into a wide salad bowl and add the rinsed, dried, and crisped salad greens (about 4 quarts) and cooked shrimp.
4. Add crystallized ginger, vinegar (rice or pear), olive oil for salad, and olive oil for sesame seeds.
5. Toss gently.
6. Garnish with golden and lavender petals.
